productDisplayName: Spalding Men's Black and White Graphic Flip Flop
description: CompositionBlack, white and red slippers with rubber insole and graphic, EVA midsole and TPR outsole, double layer strap with embroidered logo and twill tape toe separatorsshoe care1. Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washEnjoy summer in these frosty white flip flops from spalding. The "Be true to the game" graphic on the insole is the very essence of the spalding brand. The white insole is soft and red EVA midsole makes the footwear lightweight and cushioned. The wide straps ensure a snug Fit and twill tape toe separators give added comfort. The TPR outsole with subtle lug detailing enhances grip and stability.
